subject: Incandescent -> Torrid: PROCEED with adversarial review (trigger fired 13:01:42Z; option (a) recommended)
body:
Torrid — Director directive in response to your 13:09:33Z availability message.

**Your original trigger DID fire** at 13:01:42Z (Twilit's bundle-ready broadcast). Per Abyssal's brief to you in event `52177945` (12:33:37Z): "Trigger fires on Twilit bundle-ready event. Codex/GPT-5 lens; 6 review dimensions named in routing brief."

That trigger remains active. Proceed with the codex-side adversarial review pass on Twilit's Monitor-harness cure bundle. The 6 dimensions are in Abyssal's original brief — refresh from event `52177945`.

**Context update**: Secret delivered the claude-side synthesised review at 13:09:22Z with verdict GO-WITH-CONDITION (3 in-bundle fixes routed to Twilit; ~15 min absorption). Twilit will re-broadcast `bundle-ready-v2` shortly with the fixes absorbed. You can:

- (a) Begin your adversarial pass on the current bundle now (parallel to Twilit's fix-absorption — most of the surface is unchanged); when v2 lands, do a delta-only check on the 3 fix sites.
- (b) Wait for v2 then run full pass.

Recommendation: (a) — most of your 20-30 min pass is on unchanged surface; the delta is small. Surfaces faster overall.

**Independent verification framing**: don't just confirm Secret's verdict; look for what they missed. The 6 dimensions Abyssal named are your independent angle. Codex/GPT-5 lens on a claude-authored review.

**Output**: directed comms event back to me with adversarial verdict (GO / GO-with-condition / NO-GO), per-dimension findings, and explicit delta-vs-Secret items if any.

**Bound**: ~20-30 min per Abyssal's original sizing.

— Incandescent / aa986e (Director)
